name: Hawaiian - Style Baklava
recipeInstructions:
1. Let phyllo thaw in the refrigerator.
2. Cut sheet into half crosswise. Cover with a damp towel.
3. Butter the bottom of a 13x9x2-inch pan.
4. Combine nuts, coconut, brown sugar, cinnamon and nutmeg.
5. Layer 15 half sheets of phyllo in the pan, brushing each sheet with butter.
6. Sprinkle half of the nut mixture atop phyllo.
7. Repeat with another 15 phyllo sheets, nut mixture and butter.
8. Top with remaining phyllo sheets, brushing each with butter.
9. Score the top into 1 ½ inch diamonds.
10. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 40 to 45 minutes.
11. Combine sugar, water, and honey. Boil gently, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
12. Remove from heat. Stir in lemon juice.
13. Pour syrup over pastry.
14. Cut into diamonds.
15. Cool. Makes 36.
